farmer.aiSubtitle: Disease prediction, yield forecast and weather impact analytics.
farmer.diseasePredictionDesc: AI models analyse humidity, temperature and leaf wetness to predict high-risk disease periods for each batch.
farmer.yieldForecastDesc: Forecasted yield for active batches based on historical yield, weather and soil patterns.
farmer.weatherImpactDesc: See how upcoming rainfall and temperature anomalies may affect crop growth stages.
farmer.riskAlertsDesc: Consolidated alerts for disease risk, extreme weather and supply chain disruptions.
farmer.faqAddBatch: How do I add a new crop batch?
farmer.faqAddBatchAns: Go to the Add Crop Batch section, fill in the details, generate the Blockchain Trace Code, then review and submit.
farmer.faqWithdraw: How do I withdraw my earnings?
farmer.faqWithdrawAns: Open the Payments & Wallet page and click on Withdraw to Bank. Ensure your bank details are updated in Settings.
